tasks.label: QuantMap: Dev Contract Preflight
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $workspace = (Resolve-Path '.').Path; $venvPy = Join-Path $workspace '.venv\Scripts\python.exe'; $needRepair = $false; if (Test-Path $venvPy) { & $venvPy '.agent\scripts\helpers\verify_dev_contract.py' '--quick'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { exit 0 }; Write-Host 'Quick contract check failed. Running QuantMap: Repair Dev Venv once to self-heal...'; $needRepair = $true } else { Write-Host 'Repo .venv is missing. Running QuantMap: Repair Dev Venv once to self-heal...'; $needRepair = $true }; if (-not $needRepair) { exit 0 }; $holders = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { ($_.ExecutablePath -and $_.ExecutablePath.StartsWith((Join-Path $workspace '.venv'), [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) -or ($_.Name -match '^(python|pythonw|ruff|mypy|dmypy)\.exe$' -and $_.CommandLine -and $_.CommandLine.IndexOf((Join-Path $workspace '.venv'), [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase) -ge 0) }; $holders | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Stopping workspace process $($_.ProcessId): $($_.Name)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; & 'D:\.store\mise\data\installs\python\3.13.13\python.exe' -m venv .venv; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --no-user --upgrade pip; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --no-user -e '.[dev]'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe .agent\scripts\helpers\verify_dev_contract.py --quick; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }

tasks.label: QuantMap: Repair Dev Venv
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $workspace = (Resolve-Path '.').Path; $venv = Join-Path $workspace '.venv'; if (-not $venv.StartsWith($workspace, [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { throw "Refusing to repair venv outside workspace: $venv" }; $holders = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { ($_.ExecutablePath -and $_.ExecutablePath.StartsWith($venv, [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) -or ($_.Name -match '^(python|pythonw|ruff|mypy|dmypy)\.exe$' -and $_.CommandLine -and $_.CommandLine.IndexOf($venv, [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase) -ge 0) }; $holders | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Stopping workspace process $($_.ProcessId): $($_.Name)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; if (Test-Path $venv) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $venv -Recurse -Force }; & 'D:\.store\mise\data\installs\python\3.13.13\python.exe' -m venv .venv; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --no-user --upgrade pip; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --no-user -e '.[dev]'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe .agent\scripts\helpers\verify_dev_contract.py --full; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
